source_name: EPREL — European Product Registry for Energy Labelling

categories_checked.name: Space heaters/Combination heaters

categories_checked.heat_pump_subtype_note: SPACE_HEATER and COMBINATION_HEATER subtotals are from 2026-06-12 public-site inspection; may have also grown slightly
categories_checked.relevance: PRIMARY TARGET — covers both 'Space heater / Heat pump' and 'Combination heater / Heat pump' in one group; server-side filter type=HEAT_PUMP confirmed working via official API on 2026-06-18

test_run_sample.category_note: First 200 records happen to all be COMBINATION_HEATER; both subtypes are present in full dataset — no filter issue
test_run_sample.outdoor_noise_zero_note: outdoorNoise=0 indicates ground-source units with no outdoor component (not null/missing data)

endpoints_used.official_bulk_channel_base_confirmed: 2026-06-18 — confirmed via dry-run probe with official API key; X-API-KEY header accepted; HTTP 200 returned for list endpoint
endpoints_used.official_bulk_channel_rejected: https://eprel.ec.europa.eu/api/public — returns HTTP 403 {'message':'Missing Authentication Token'} even with valid key; this is NOT the correct base

spaceheaters.outdoor_noise_zero_note: ground-source units (no outdoor component), not missing data

download_note: 108 inspection samples (2026-06-12 public-site probes, gitignored under raw/test/) + 600 official API test records (2026-06-18 --test run, gitignored under raw/test/official-api/) + 46,527 full snapshot records (2026-06-18 --full run, gitignored under raw/2026-06/). Total = 47,235.
legal_or_terms_notes: Official Public API requires an API key requested via https://eprel.ec.europa.eu/screen/requestpublicapikey (form requires acceptance of T&C).
Official T&C (in force since 2024-06-03) archived at terms/EPREL_Public_API_Terms_and_Conditions_EN.pdf.

T&C Art. 4 §1 PERMITS: reproduction/share/distribution for commercial and non-commercial purposes as value-added services, derivative works, research, internal market analysis, and use in 'mobile applications and other comparison tools' — matches Heatpump Data Base use case.

T&C Art. 4 §2 PROHIBITS: selling the raw data as-is; restricting others' reuse; disrupting EPREL; misleading modifications; failing to keep locally stored data up to date (§2.f — relevant: monthly refresh obligation); exploiting vulnerabilities or working around technical limitations.
T&C Art. 4 §3 requires attribution to the European Commission / EPREL when publishing data.
Data accuracy is supplier-provided and not guaranteed (Art. 7) — display disclaimers accordingly.
No robots.txt is served (SPA HTML returned for /robots.txt).
Per project decision 2026-06-12: NO anonymous bulk scraping of the public-site endpoints, even though technically reachable; bulk retrieval waits for an official API key.

field_schema_observed.note: 130 fields observed from official API test run 2026-06-18 (was 119 from public-site inspection; difference may reflect additional combination-heater water-heating fields)

limitations: spaceheaterpackages heat-pump subset could not be isolated server-side during inspection; still unresolved — needs official API docs to confirm a filter parameter.
Field semantics (units, scale, enumerations for energyClass codes) not yet formally documented; encoding observed: APPP=A+++, APP=A++, AP=A+, A=A, B=B, C=C.
Energy label / product-information-sheet file download endpoints not yet exercised.
onMarketFirstStartDate has corrupted timestamps (year 213 in sample data) — do not use for chronological sorting.
outdoorNoise=0 is valid data (ground-source units, no outdoor component) — must not be treated as null or missing.
mediumTemp* fields are present for units with medium-temperature performance data (55°C flow); absence does not mean incomplete record.
script_preparation_log: 2026-06-17: Fixed X-API-KEY header (was x-api-key). Added page-skip/resume logic. Added --full confirmation gate. Updated .gitignore to exclude raw/20*/ and raw/test/official-api/.

2026-06-18: Dry-run confirmed API base https://eprel.ec.europa.eu/api (HTTP 200 with X-API-KEY). Candidate base https://eprel.ec.europa.eu/api/public rejected (HTTP 403 Missing Authentication Token). --test run completed: 600 records across 3 categories, 6 files. All required fields present. No key leak in stored JSON.

2026-06-18: Prepared script for production-safe full snapshot. Changes: (1) CANDIDATE_BASES reordered — confirmed base first, 403-failing /api/public last; (2) --full output path changed from flat raw/<folder>/ to versioned raw/YYYY-MM/<folder>/; (3) --snapshot YYYY-MM optional CLI arg added for explicit snapshot label; (4) _meta.json written per category folder after full download completes; (5) --full confirmation gate updated to show snapshot label and versioned output path; (6) estimated records updated 45295→45480 (confirmed from test run). Gitignore pattern raw/20*/ already covers new versioned paths — no .gitignore changes needed.

2026-06-18: Full download completed. 3 categories: spaceheaters 45,480/45,480 records (455 pages), temperature-controls 840/840 (9 pages), solar-devices 207/207 (3 pages). All _meta.json complete=true. Validation: all required fields present, no key leak in stored JSON, energyClass distribution APPP×34487 APP×8234 AP×2133 A×355 B×179 C×85 D×7, visibleToUkMsa=true: 2569, outdoorNoise=0: 3333. Total raw snapshot: 46,527 records, 467 page files.
next_recommended_step: Full snapshot validated. Next: (1) parse and canonicalize BAFA JSON (scripts/bafa/parse-bafa.mjs); (2) build canonical brand map (pipeline/canonical_brands.json); (3) design and run 50-pair BAFA↔EPREL matching test using supplierOrTrademark+modelIdentifier join fields; (4) store eprelRegistrationNumber in HeatPump.eprel_registration_number for matched records.
